title: Bills
description: When your vendor supplies goods/services to you on credit, you're sent an invoice that details the amount of money you owe him. You can record this as a bill in Zoho Inventory and track it until it's paid.

bill_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server. This is used as identifier.

purchaseorder_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the Purchase Order.

vendor_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the vendor.

due_by_days.description: Number of days by which the Bill is due.

currency_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the currency. This is used as an identifier.

currency_symbol.description: The symbol for the selected currency.

exchange_rate.description: Exchange rate of the currency, with respect to the base currency.

price_precision.description: The precision level for the price's decimal point in a Bill.

is_item_level_tax_calc.description: Checks whether item level tax is calculated or not.

purchaseorder_item_id.description: Unique ID generated for a line item in the Purchase Order.

receive_item_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the receive.

line_item_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for each line item. This is used as an identifier.

bcy_rate.description: Item rate in the organization's base currency.

tax_id.description: Unique ID of the tax applied on the line item.

tds_tax_id.description: TDS ID of the tax or tax group applied to the line item

item_order.description: Order of the line item, starting from 0.

image_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the item image. This is used an identifier.

image_name.description: Name of the image of the line item.

image_type.description: The type (file format) of the image.

hsn_or_sac.description: Add HSN/SAC code for your goods/services

tax_exemption_id.description: ID of the Tax Exemption Applied

tax_exemption_code.description: Code of the Tax Exemption Applied

reverse_charge_tax_name.description: Name of the reverse charge tax

customfield_id.description: Unique identifier of the custom field

item_custom_fields.description: List of custom fields associated with the line item

line_items.description: The line items for a Bill.

taxes.description: Number of taxes applied on the Purchase Order. Each tax contains: tax_name and tax_amount.

vendor_credits_applied.description: Vendor credits applied to the Bill.

address.description: Name of the street of the customer's billing address.

city.description: Name of the city of the customer's billing address.

state.description: Name of the state of the customer's billing address.

zip.description: Zip code of the customer's billing address.

country.description: Name of the country of the customer's billing address.

fax.description: Fax number of the customer's billing address.

billing_address.description: Customer's billing address. It contains - address, city, state, zip, country and fax.

vendor_credit_id.description: Unique ID generated by server for vendor credits

vendor_credit_bill_id.description: Unique ID generated by server for vendor credit bills

payment_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server. This is used as identifier.

payment_mode.description: Mode of payment for the Bill.

paid_through_account_id.description: ID for the account through which the payment is made.

is_single_bill_payment.description: Checks whether the payment is for single bills or multiple bills.

created_time.description: Time at which the Bill details were last created.

last_modified_time.description: Time at which the bill details were last Modified.

reference_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the reference.

is_inclusive_tax.description: Indicates whether the item rates are tax inclusive or exclusive

open_purchaseorders_count.description: Number of Purchase Orders that are associated with this Bill and open.

source_of_supply.description: Place from where the goods/services are supplied. (If not given, place of contact given for the contact will be taken)

destination_of_supply.description: Place where the goods/services are supplied to. (If not given, organisation's home state will be taken)

gst_treatment.description: Choose whether the contact is GST registered/unregistered/consumer/overseas. Allowed values are business_gst , business_none , overseas , consumer .

tax_treatment.description: VAT treatment for the bill. Choose whether the vendor falls under: home_country_mexico,border_region_mexico,non_mexico supported only for MX.

gst_no.description: 15 digit GST identification number of the vendor.

is_pre_gst.description: Applicable for transactions that fall before july 1, 2017

is_reverse_charge_applied.description: Applicable for transactions where you pay reverse charge

serial_numbers.description: Serial numbers for the line item. Applicable only for items with serial tracking enabled.

batches.description: Batches for the line item. Create a new batch using batch_number or reference an existing batch using batch_id. Applicable only for items with batch tracking enabled.

batch_id.description: Unique identifier of a batch. Use when adding inward quantity to an existing batch or updating a batch.

batch_number.description: Batch number. Required when creating a new batch.

external_batch_number.description: External batch number from the manufacturer. Applicable when creating a new batch.

manufacturer_date.description: Manufacturing date of the batch. Applicable when creating a new batch.

expiry_date.description: Expiration date of the batch. Applicable when creating a new batch.

storages.description: Bin/storage locations allocated for stock received against this batch.

storage_id.description: Unique identifier of the bin/storage location.

storages.description: Bin/storage locations allocated for the line item. Applicable only for items with bin tracking enabled.

storage_id.description: Unique identifier of the bin/storage location.

serial_numbers.description: Serial numbers allocated to this bin.

batches-update.description: Batches for the line item. Create a new batch using batch_number or reference an existing batch using batch_id. Applicable only for items with batch tracking enabled.

batch_id.description: Unique identifier of a batch. Use when adding inward quantity to an existing batch or updating a batch.

batch_number.description: Batch number. Required when creating a new batch.

external_batch_number.description: External batch number from the manufacturer. Applicable when creating a new batch.

manufacturer_date.description: Manufacturing date of the batch. Applicable when creating a new batch.

expiry_date.description: Expiration date of the batch. Applicable when creating a new batch.

batch_in_id.description: Unique identifier of the batch record. Applicable only when updating an existing batch entry.

storages.description: Bin/storage locations allocated for stock received against this batch.

storage_id.description: Unique identifier of the bin/storage location.

storage_in_id.description: Unique identifier of the storage record. Applicable only when updating an existing storage entry.

storages-update.description: Bin/storage locations allocated for the line item. Applicable only for items with bin tracking enabled.

storage_id.description: Unique identifier of the bin/storage location.

storage_in_id.description: Unique identifier of the storage record. Applicable only when updating an existing storage entry.

serial_numbers.description: Serial numbers allocated to this bin.

batches-response.description: Batches tracked for the line item. Returned for items with batch tracking enabled.

external_batch_number.description: External batch number from the manufacturer.

in_quantity.description: Inward quantity recorded for the batch.

batch_in_id.description: Unique identifier of the batch entry on the line item.

storages.description: Bin/storage locations from which stock was received for this batch.

storage_id.description: Unique identifier of the bin/storage location.

storage_name.description: Display name of the bin/storage location.

in_quantity.description: Inward quantity recorded against the bin.

storage_in_id.description: Unique identifier of the storage entry on the line item.

storages-response.description: Bin/storage locations tracked for the line item. Returned for items with bin tracking enabled.

storage_id.description: Unique identifier of the bin/storage location.

storage_name.description: Display name of the bin/storage location.

in_quantity.description: Inward quantity recorded against the bin.

storage_in_id.description: Unique identifier of the storage entry on the line item.

serial_numbers.description: Serial numbers allocated to this bin.

line_items.description: The line items for a Bill.
The line items for a Bill.

message.example: The bill has been marked as open.
The bill has been marked as Void.

reason.description: Reason for rejecting the bill. Max-length [500].
